The Roughriders host the Elks at Mosaic Stadium in Regina for a CFL regular-season game. The Edmonton Elks stand 5-1 following a tight 19-17 victory over the BC Lions. The Saskatchewan Roughriders stand at 4-1 coming off a restful bye week.
